TUTORIAL_STEP_1: You can check the <color=#FFC04C>damaged parts</color> on D1AL that need repair right now.
TUTORIAL_STEP_3: First, let's <color=#FFC04C>select</color> a damaged part to repair.
TUTORIAL_STEP_4: D1AL consists of <color=#FFC04C>4 layers</color> and <color=#FFC04C>6 indices</color>.
TUTORIAL_STEP_5: Each module can be moved by <color=#FFC04C>dragging</color> it to swap places with adjacent modules up, down, left, or right.
TUTORIAL_STEP_6: Moving modules uses D1AL's <color=#FFC04C>battery</color>.\nIf you use up all the battery, you can't move anymore.\nLet's try moving a module.
TUTORIAL_STEP_7: While dragging a module, <color=#FFC04C>right-click</color> to cancel the move. \n Try canceling the move with a right-click.
TUTORIAL_STEP_8: If you move modules to align <color=#FFC04C>3 or more</color>, they <color=#FFC04C>synthesize</color> into a higher-tier unit.
TUTORIAL_STEP_9: Let's try <color=#FFC04C>synthesizing</color> modules into a higher-tier unit.
TUTORIAL_STEP_11: You can check the current damaged location and required units on the <color=#FFC04C>right panel</color>.\n<blink> (Click Info Panel to proceed)</blink>
TUTORIAL_STEP_12: <color=#FFC04C>Hover</color> your mouse over each damaged location to see the required unit.
TUTORIAL_STEP_13: <color=#FFC04C>Synthesize</color> the required unit and move it to the damaged location.\n(You can also repair using a higher-tier unit.)
TUTORIAL_STEP_14: Placing the required unit on the damaged spot activates the <color=#FFC04C>Replace button</color>. Press it to swap the unit.
TUTORIAL_STEP_16: Hmm, looks like the replacement went well.\nAlright, let's keep going. Select the next damaged part.
TUTORIAL_STEP_17: This case requires multiple types of units.\nThe Info Panel will show the required unit <color=#FFC04C>colors</color> for each position.
TUTORIAL_STEP_18: Just place the units according to the <color=#FFC04C>colors</color> to replace them.
TUTORIAL_STEP_20: Now, let's select the final damaged part.
TUTORIAL_STEP_21: The last damaged part requires a <color=#FFC04C>high-tier</color> unit.
TUTORIAL_STEP_22: You can check unit appearances by tier on the phone by pressing <color=#FFC04C>Tab</color>.\n<blink> (Press Tab to proceed)</blink>
TUTORIAL_STEP_23: Let's press the <color=#FFC04C>Encyclopedia button</color> on the phone.
TUTORIAL_STEP_24: Here you can see the icons for each unit level.
TUTORIAL_STEP_25: Let's use D1AL's <color=#FFC04C>special function</color>.\nThere's a <color=#FFC04C>gauge bar</color> on the left.\n<blink> (Click Gauge Bar to proceed)</blink>
TUTORIAL_STEP_27: When fully charged, <color=#FFC04C>click</color> the gauge and then a module or unit of another type to convert it.
TUTORIAL_STEP_28: Let's try changing a type.\nYou can cancel by <color=#FFC04C>right-clicking</color>.
TUTORIAL_STEP_15: Once replaced, <color=#FFC04C>all remaining modules</color> must be synthesized before proceeding to the next repair.
51005_TUTORIAL_STEP_1: Looks like someone had too much fun yesterday...\nIt seems D1AL has a problem due to an <color=#FFC04C>overloaded unit</color>.
51005_TUTORIAL_STEP_2: First, let's check the repair area.\n<blink> (Select repair area to proceed)</blink>
51005_TUTORIAL_STEP_3: As expected, there's an overloaded unit.\nOverloaded units <color=#FFC04C>destroy</color> nearby modules/units every certain number of turns.\n<blink> (Click Overloaded Unit to proceed)</blink>
51005_TUTORIAL_STEP_4: Turns remaining until overload are shown in the <color=#FFC04C>top right</color>.\n<blink> (Click top right panel to proceed)</blink>
51005_TUTORIAL_STEP_5: Upon overload, <color=#FFC04C>1 space left/right</color> of the unit and modules/units in the <color=#FFC04C>same column</color> will be destroyed.\n<blink> (Click Overloaded Unit to proceed)</blink>
51005_TUTORIAL_STEP_6: The overloaded unit will be destroyed after undergoing overload <color=#FFC04C>3 times</color>.\nLet's repair while avoiding destruction of required units.
51010_TUTORIAL_STEP_1: It doesn't look like there's much wrong on the outside...\nI think we need to take a closer look.
51010_TUTORIAL_STEP_2: Let's proceed with the repair quickly.\n<blink> (Select repair area to proceed)</blink>
51010_TUTORIAL_STEP_3: This looks like an <color=#FFC04C>Electronic Drug</color> unit.\nChecks show it infects nearby modules/units every certain number of turns.\n<blink> (Click Electronic Drug unit to proceed)</blink>
51010_TUTORIAL_STEP_4: Turns remaining until Electronic Drug infection are shown in the <color=#FFC04C>top right</color>.\n<blink> (Click top right panel to proceed)</blink>
51010_TUTORIAL_STEP_5: It seems the Electronic Drug spreads to modules located <color=#FFC04C>up, down, left, or right</color>.\n<blink> (Click Electronic Drug unit to proceed)</blink>
51010_TUTORIAL_STEP_6: You can remove the drug code from an Electronic Drug unit by <color=#FFC04C>synthesizing</color> it.\nBe careful not to let it infect high-level units, and remove all the drugs.
51011_TUTORIAL_STEP_1: The damage is too severe...\nI need to start repairs immediately.
51011_TUTORIAL_STEP_2: Select the damaged part before operation stops.\n<blink> (Select repair area to proceed)</blink>
51011_TUTORIAL_STEP_3: The damage is bad... it won't move, and it won't synthesize.\nLooks like a unit got <color=#FFC04C>fused</color> due to the heat.\n<blink> (Click Broken Unit to proceed)</blink>
51011_TUTORIAL_STEP_4: We have no choice but to <color=#FFC04C>avoid</color> that unit for now and proceed with repairs.
TUTORIAL_STEP_10: If you synthesize modules a total of <color=#FFC04C>10 times</color>, the battery overcharges and increases max capacity.\n<blink> (Click battery to proceed)</blink>
TUTORIAL_STEP_19: Now, place the required modules to complete the maintenance.\n(You can also repair using a higher-tier unit.)
TUTORIAL_STEP_26: This gauge charges for the corresponding type when <color=#FFC04C>4 or more</color> modules are synthesized.
TUTORIAL_STEP_2: <color=#FFC04C>Hover</color> over the damaged part to see the required units.
TUTORIAL_STEP_29: If you made a mistake or think it's hopeless, press the <color=#FFC04C>Restart button</color> to try the repair again.\n<blink> (Click Restart Button to proceed)</blink>

90005_7: <color=#BD9ED5>Chris</color> : The Captain is calling. Time to move out and protect the citizens, right?
90005_9: <color=#D3D184>Pray</color> : F-fine! I'm going! I said I'm going!!
90006_3: <color=#D97C80>Lianne</color> : I know you're trying to be considerate,
90006_4: <color=#D97C80>Lianne</color> : but ignoring my signals until the very end... it's really cruel.
90006_5: <color=#BD9ED5>Chris</color> : ...Never mind that, what is that syringe in your hand?
90006_6: <color=#D97C80>Lianne</color> : It's a drug that makes you honest. Let go of complex thoughts and just relax.
90006_7: <color=#BD9ED5>Chris</color> : Just hearing the description makes it sound dangerous.
90006_8: <color=#D97C80>Lianne</color> : No way, it's very safe. I already took it myself.
90006_10: <color=#D97C80>Lianne</color> : It should be kicking in about now... How is it? Do you feel anything?

90007_4: <color=#9DB2E8>Orca</color> : If you'd like, you can hold onto my tail.
90007_6: <color=#9DB2E8>Orca</color> : My tail is also used for rescue purposes,
90007_7: <color=#9DB2E8>Orca</color> : so it handles vibration well-- Hyk?!
90007_8: <color=#9DB2E8>Orca</color> : ...W-wait! Th-that part has a lot of nerves!
90007_9: <color=#BD9ED5>Chris</color> : Sorry. Old habit from being a mechanic...
90007_12: <color=#BD9ED5>Chris</color> : Ack?! Orca... if you wrap your tail around my neck... I can't... breathe...
51001_NEWS_SUBJECT: 'Buff Girl O'Hara' Hype Peaks...\nNeural Network Unit 'O'rhasm Buff' Released
51001_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: WMP (Waifu Matin Press)</align>\n
The hit series 'Buff Girl O'Hara', currently ranking #1 in streaming charts and real-time interest, is reaching peak hype ahead of its finale on February 3rd. Capitalizing on the show's success, the distributor unveiled the collaboration custom unit 'O'rhasm Buff', set for official release on February 4th, the day after the finale.\n
The O'rhasm Buff draws attention with a design inspired by O'Hara's champion belt. Notably, it replaces traditional manual operation with an automated sympathetic nerve stimulation function via a feedback loop. The product features forced photonic neural network update technology to control system overhead caused by continuous sympathetic stimulation.
51002_NEWS_SUBJECT: A New Dawn for E.V.E Maintenance...\n'D6AL' Unveiled: Fully Automated Process
51002_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: Sunshine Dispatch</align>\n
Last night (13th), Sunshine Corp unveiled the 'D6AL', a 6th generation architecture diagnostic lens that moves away from traditional manual mechanic work to fully automate the maintenance process. This new product eliminates cumbersome manual synthesis and part replacement. It features proprietary 'Real-time Autonomous Calibration' technology that minimizes human intervention, maximizing system precision and maintenance efficiency.\n
Sunshine Corp stated that introducing the D6AL will replace outdated, imperfect maintenance methods and enable immediate, data-driven system recovery and optimization.
51003_NEWS_SUBJECT: [Exclusive] Unidentified Component Found...\nNano Catalyst 'Design Mismatch' Controversy
51003_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: The Noise</align>\n
Controversy is erupting after an unidentified molecular component not listed in official blueprints was discovered in the Nano Catalysts mandatorily inoculated into Chroma City citizens. In addition to identification and data collection, Nano Catalysts perform the core function of forcibly inducing serotonin secretion in reaction to Neon Shine to prevent LDS (Light Deficiency Syndrome) caused by sunlight deprivation.\n
Precise molecular analysis of recently extracted Nano Catalyst samples confirmed the presence of an unidentified element nonexistent in the standard specifications released by authorities. While Chroma City authorities maintain it is "merely an impurity generated during catalyst aging," their passive response, failing to provide technical evidence to support this claim, is only amplifying suspicions.
51004_NEWS_SUBJECT: Mayor Lucas: "E.V.E are Partners Sharing Souls"...\nSigmund Pact 50th Anniversary Speech
51004_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: CCS (Chroma City Standard)</align>\n
Yesterday afternoon (14th), the 50th Anniversary Ceremony of the Sigmund Pact, symbolizing the harmony between humanity and artificial intelligence, was held at Chroma City Central Plaza. Taking the podium, Mayor Lucas reflected on the significance of the pact, calling it "A historical turning point where simple computational devices known as E.E. (Electric Entity) evolved into E.V.E. (Electric Vital Entity) through photonic neural networks, becoming recognized as beings with independent personalities."\n
He emphasized that E.V.E, having moved past an era of discrimination to guaranteed legal rights, are key citizens supporting the eternal night of this city alongside humans. He concluded with a message hoping that through the rational coexistence perfected by Sunshine Corp's technology, the next 50 years will also lead to an era of prosperity without discrimination, drawing cheers from the citizens and E.V.Es gathered in the plaza.
51005_NEWS_SUBJECT: [Exclusive] Natural LDS Confirmed Impossible...\nSuspicion of Nano Catalyst Intervention
51005_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: The Noise</align>\n
Medical opinions suggesting that Chroma City's Light Deficiency Syndrome (LDS) may not be a naturally occurring disease are causing a stir. Following consultation with specialists from external cities, analysis indicates that simple lack of light cannot cause irreversible nervous system damage, the severe stage of LDS, given human physiology.\n
Experts pointed out that while Stage 1 "Dimming" (lethargy due to serotonin deficiency) is possible, Stage 2 "Flicker" (cognitive impairment) and Stage 3 "Blackout" (frontal lobe shutdown) fall outside the scope of general neurological disorders. Consequently, suspicions are deepening that the unidentified molecular components in Nano Catalysts, mentioned in previous reports, are intentionally accumulating metabolic waste in the cerebrum to artificially induce LDS.
51006_NEWS_SUBJECT: [Notice] Polar Night Day\nIntensive Crackdown Period Announcement
51006_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: USA (Urban Stability Agency)</align>\n
This is an announcement from the Urban Stability Agency (USA). In celebration of 'Polar Night Day', Chroma City's largest festival, a 'Special Intensive Crackdown Period' will be in effect from today until the end of the festival. This measure aims to prevent social disorder during the festival and maintain the homeostasis of the urban system.\n
During this period, Nano Catalyst scanning by Stabilizers will be significantly intensified across Chroma City. In particular, illegal procedures under the guise of LDS prevention and the use or distribution of unauthorized private Neon Shines are strictly prohibited. Citizens are requested to fully cooperate with scanning procedures at temporary checkpoints installed in each district. Warning: Any act detrimental to the stability of the urban system will be subject to immediate administrative action without exception.
51007_NEWS_SUBJECT: Sunshine Corp Executive Attacked and Missing...\nGlass Slipper Found at Scene
51007_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: CCS (Chroma City Standard)</align>\n
Last night (15th), an incident occurred in the Deep Red Street district on the city outskirts where a high-ranking Sunshine Corp executive was attacked by an unidentified terrorist and went missing. USA investigation results confirmed that all Stabilizers guarding the scene were killed. They all died instantly from precise penetrating wounds in the shape of a stiletto heel to the center of the forehead. A blood-stained glass slipper, presumed to be used in the crime, was left at the crime scene.\n
Authorities are focusing on the fact that the modus operandi matches a series of disappearances that have occurred over the past few months. This terrorist, known to the public as 'Cinderella', has been targeting high-ranking government officials and Sunshine Corp executives. All victims so far remain missing with their survival unconfirmed. The USA has formed a special investigation team to clarify the truth of this incident and is tracking the culprit's whereabouts by analyzing connections with previous incidents presumed to be the work of the same offender.
51008_NEWS_SUBJECT: Cold Metal? Melting When Stripped...\n'Secret Tuning' Skyrockets
51008_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: WMP (Waifu Matin Press)</align>\n
As marriage registrations between humans and E.V.Es hit an all-time high, the trend of 'Secret Tuning'—modifying E.V.E body parts into forms optimized for sexual activity—is spreading in the shadows. Going beyond simple cosmetic imitation, this procedure implants ultra-fine heating coatings and vibration modules into bio-silicone mucosa to create reproductive organs that surpass human biological functions. In an interview, an illegal tuner emphasized, "Customization from firmness to internal temperature is possible according to taste," adding, "Humans who experience it once can never return to organic embrace."\n
Of course, the public eye remains harsh. The dominant conservative view points fingers at them as 'scrap metal fetishists'. However, to soothe the solitude of the gray night, minor lovers willing to endure expensive royalties and social contempt to be held in their lovers' arms are secretly climbing onto the operating table again today.
51009_NEWS_SUBJECT: High-Risk A.D.A.M Suppressed in City...\nSummary Executioner: Between Fear and Salvation
51009_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: AP (Achromatic Press)</align>\n
Yesterday's rampage of a high-risk A.D.A.M in the city center was quelled early by the deployment of Sunshine Corp's Summary Executioners. The eliminated unit was confirmed to be an 'Autonomous Data Anomaly Manifestation', having entered LDS Stage 3 Blackout, with self-data lost and only slaughter instincts remaining. To avoid repeating the nightmare of the first E.V.E 'Adam', Sunshine Corp emphasized, "Periodic photonic cleaning via Neon Shine is the only preventive measure, and Executioners are the last bastion to delete system errors that have already occurred."\n
The emotionless Summary Executioner eliminated the A.D.A.M without hesitation again, but the view from the scene is complicated. Due to the complete immunity granted by the government, compensation for the damage to citizens caught up in the suppression process remains elusive. Citizens' eyes, looking upon the Summary Executioners—the shield protecting Chroma City and the blade of terror reigning above the law—cross perilously between relief and trembling.
51010_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: AP (Achromatic Press)</align>\n
Early this morning (17th), an explosive attack presumed to be the work of the anti-government terrorist group 'Morning Glory' occurred at the Stabilizer Academy located on Dark Brown Street on the city outskirts. This resulted in the complete destruction of parts of the facility and children being trapped at the scene.\n
The damage to the site is understood to be severe due to this attack, which is presumed to have used military-grade explosives. Immediately after the accident, a rescue team from the Urban Recovery Agency was urgently dispatched and is conducting search and rescue operations, but the specific scale of casualties and detailed situation have not yet been reported.
51011_NEWS_SUBJECT: [Notice] Polar Night Day\nOutskirts Power Optimization Guide
51011_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: USA (Urban Stability Agency)</align>\n
This is an announcement from the Urban Stability Agency (USA). To ensure the flawless realization of 'Chromatic Zenith', planned as the largest scale event in history by Sunshine Corp and the Independent Government, power optimization will be implemented on the day of Polar Night Day, temporarily cutting off power in some outskirts districts to concentrate it in the center. This is an unavoidable measure to secure stable output during the Chromatic Zenith proceedings.\n
Residents of the affected areas are requested to fully charge battery units in advance in preparation for the announced blackout period and strictly adhere to guidelines for LDS prevention. We ask for the cooperation of citizens for the glory of Chroma City.
51012_NEWS_SUBJECT: Entering 'Total Polar Night' From Today...\n5 Days Without Even Gray Night
51012_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: CCS (Chroma City Standard)</align>\n
Starting today (17th) until Polar Night Day on the 21st, the city enters a 'Total Polar Night' phase where not even the gray night is permitted. It is a period when even the gray scattered light that barely colored the surface by piercing through the pollution layer covering the stratosphere disappears.\n
The Urban Stability Agency warned that "LDS onset speed could accelerate faster than usual due to the complete extinction of light," and strongly recommended citizens significantly increase their Neon Shine usage time. The Total Polar Night period, covering Chroma City in the deepest darkness of the year, is scheduled to end with Polar Night Day on the 21st.
51013_NEWS_SUBJECT: [Exclusive] Cry to End the Ash Gray Night...\nEveryone Assemble
51013_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: The Noise</align>\n
Since the Urban Stability Agency (USA) declared the intensive crackdown period, the streets of Chroma City have been consumed by fear, not peace. The blood of innocent citizens is staining the asphalt due to indiscriminate excessive force and unannounced inspections without warrants by Stabilizers, and those asserting legitimate rights are vanishing without a trace. Suppressed anger has already reached a critical point. The Nano Catalyst suspicions reported daily by this press have now turned into conviction. Sunshine Corp and the Chroma City Independent Government are injecting slave brands into our bloodstream, slowly killing us to maintain their empire. Therefore, on the 5th, we announce a massive assembly on Dark Brown Street to demand the truth about Nano Catalysts and fight for the right to survive.\n
Do not hide behind the hazy comfort given by Neon Shine anymore. Only when we all pour into the streets and become a massive noise will an irreversible crack form in this rotten system. A true morning is not given for free; it is won by cutting out the power of the night. Witness the dazzling morning that will change the city's fate together on Dark Brown Street.
51014_NEWS_SUBJECT: Ban on Old Dial Equipment Considered...\n'Maintenance Blind Spot' Controversy
51014_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: AP (Achromatic Press)</align>

As arrests of E.V.Es involved in recent crimes increase, authorities are moving to regulate older Dial (DXAL) equipment that aids their illegal modification. While current Dial models transmit maintenance records to Sunshine Corp in real-time, 1st and 2nd generation models lack tracking functions, drawing criticism that they are being misused as covert maintenance tools by criminal organizations. Consequently, Chroma City authorities are carefully reviewing a ban on the use and confiscation of older equipment to strengthen security.


However, this is still in the discussion stage, and actual enforcement measures have not been finalized. Upon hearing the news, fierce backlash is already erupting among mechanics and citizens in the lower-class districts. For commoners who cannot afford the massive royalties and purchase costs of new Dial equipment, the confiscation of older equipment is effectively tantamount to the deprivation of E.V.E maintenance rights. The government stated that it is discussing technical alternatives between blocking criminal abuse and protecting the common people.
51015_NEWS_SUBJECT: Red Miracle Blooms in Ashes...\nScarlet Response Unit Rescues All Children
51015_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: CCS (Chroma City Standard)</align>\n
The 'Scarlet Response Unit' under the Urban Stability Agency announced that they successfully rescued all trapped children just 4 hours after being deployed to the scene of the Stabilizer Academy explosion terror attack that occurred early yesterday morning (17th). The TN-DLS models, who entered the deepest parts impossible for general rescue teams to access due to collapse risks, utilized special armor to clear debris and secure survivors.\n
Although there were losses such as injuries to some members and damage to external equipment during this operation, they proved their unrivaled rescue capabilities by ending the situation without a single casualty. An official from the Urban Stability Agency stated, "Thanks to the sacrifice of the Scarlet Response Unit despite Morning Glory's brutal terror, we were able to protect the city's future." The rescued children are currently reported to be resting and receiving precise medical examinations at nearby medical facilities.
51016_NEWS_SUBJECT: [Exclusive] A Wave of Citizens Dyed in Red...\nMartyrs' Blood Becomes Spark of Revolution
51016_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: The Noise</align>\n
Yesterday afternoon, we witnessed it. The cold barrels of Stabilizers, who supposedly protect citizen safety, pierced the chests of innocent brothers. The only response to peaceful shouts was brutal excessive suppression and death. But their tyranny poked the sleeping lion. The moment one citizen fell, Dark Brown Street transformed into a massive sanctuary of liberation. Enraged citizens took up arms themselves and delivered righteous judgment to the rulers of the eternal night. This is not a simple riot. It is a holy war against the rotten Sunshine Corp and their puppet government.\n
The will for revolution blooming in the darkness will never be broken. The establishment screams for stability in fear, but a massive wave has already begun. Remember, the blood we shed yesterday is the brilliant prelude that will dye the coming true morning red.
51017_NEWS_SUBJECT: [Special Report] Clash on Dark Brown Street...\nTragedy of 10 Years Ago Reenacted?
51017_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: AP (Achromatic Press)</align>\n
Reporters at the scene conveyed that the rally on Dark Brown Street turned into an armed clash around 4 PM, resulting in uncontrollable bloodshed. The scene has fallen into extreme chaos with protesters and public power intermingled. In particular, as an unidentified revolutionary group committed organized sabotage such as destroying communication beacons, initial entry and situation control by the Urban Stability Agency and Urban Recovery Agency are effectively being blocked.\n
What citizens watching this situation are focusing on most is that the timing and aspect of the riot resemble the 'Chromatic Zenith Terror Incident', recorded as the worst disaster in Chroma City history 10 years ago. At that time, on the night when the Chromatic Zenith festival reached its peak, terror began with a mysterious explosion, engulfing the entire city in a massive fire.\n
The fire at the time is evaluated to have been extensive and fatal enough that Chroma City, which advocated self-sufficiency, had to exceptionally request emergency rescue and support from neighboring cities. The flames, which soared to the pollution layer of the stratosphere, went beyond a simple disaster, leaving deep scars on the city's pride and overall safety system that remain unhealed to this day. Experts analyzed that this disturbance is stimulating citizens' collective trauma in that it reminds them of the nightmare of 10 years ago.
51018_NEWS_SUBJECT: Sunshine Corp Recruits 'Shadow Agency' Actors...\nYour Acting Becomes Salvation
51018_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: Sunshine Dispatch</align>\n
Sunshine Corp is recruiting new E.V.E actors on a large scale for its psychological care program 'Shadow Agency' service. This noble duty, which comforts the pain of loss by synchronizing the memory archives of the deceased into the neural network, is evaluated as a bridge connecting souls beyond simple acting.\n
Selected actors will be provided with the industry's best unconventional performance bonuses, as well as the highest grade Neon Shine Care free of charge to prevent self-data contamination. Under the slogan "Become the protagonist of a life with just one synchronization," applications are expected to flood in from countless E.V.Es dreaming of rising in status and escaping the slums.
51019_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: Neon-Net Network Administration</align>

The 'The Noise' account has been permanently suspended and closed for seriously violating 'Article 24 of the Chroma City National Security and Urban Stabilization Act (Incitement of Insurrection and Dissemination of False Facts)' and 'NEON-NET Service Operation Regulations'.


[Reason for Blocking]

-Suspicion of collusion with and participation in operations of the anti-government terrorist organization Morning Glory

-Directing the Dark Brown Street riot behind the scenes and inciting armed struggle against citizens

-Causing social chaos through the dissemination of malicious false facts regarding Nano Catalysts and LDS

-Attempting to neutralize the public power of the Urban Stability Agency (USA) and seriously impairing the urban happiness index

( Viewing, saving, or sharing posts by The Noise or any act advocating for the group is considered aiding and abetting anti-state terrorism, and strictly notified as subject to immediate summary punishment without exception. )

"Order is Peace, and the light of Neon protects you."
51020_NEWS_SUBJECT: Large-Scale Bloodshed in City Center...\n'Morning Glory' and High-Level Ties Suspected
51020_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: AP (Achromatic Press)</align>\n
The large-scale rally that took place on Dark Brown Street last afternoon (19th) escalated into extreme bloodshed, causing great shock across the city. The excessive suppression by Stabilizers and citizen fatalities during the protest became the trigger, turning the peaceful rally into an armed riot in an instant. It is understood that the anti-government terrorist group 'Morning Glory' intervened at the scene, inciting citizens and supplying weapons.\n
Of particular note in this situation are the military-spec high-performance firearms spotted on the protesters' side. Experts raised the possibility that high-ranking forces within Chroma City supported Morning Glory from behind for power struggles, stating, "Equipment impossible for civilian organizations to obtain independently was distributed in large quantities." The situation was forcibly suppressed only after Sunshine Corp's Summary Executioners, the City Government Special Forces, and the Gray Unit were deployed, but it left significant casualties and property damage.\n
Mayor Lucas stated in an emergency statement, "I express deep regret over the tragic situation and will do my utmost to settle the accident immediately." He also specified that the Chromatic Zenith scheduled for a day later will be held without setbacks. The Mayor appealed for citizen unity, saying, "This event will go beyond a simple festival to become a light of remembrance binding wounded citizens together and a milestone of new hope."
51021_NEWS_SUBJECT: Brilliant Radiance Piercing the Night...\nLargest 'Chromatic Zenith' Set for Tomorrow
51021_NEWS_CONTENT:
<align="right">Author: CCS (Chroma City Standard)</align>\n
At the peak of Polar Night Day, when Chroma City's deepest darkness arrives, the 45th Chromatic Zenith, watched by the whole world, will raise its spectacular curtain tomorrow (21st) at 8 PM.\n
The Entire Sky as a Screen... Hologram Panorama Covering the City\n
At 8 PM sharp when the event begins, a super-giant panoramic hologram covering the entire city will unfold, using the pollution layer of the stratosphere as a screen. This artificial light source, observable from anywhere in the city center, will erase the pitch-black polar night and paint over it with Chroma City's brilliant colors. The first half of the performance epically depicts Chroma City's great journey from an ordinary industrial complex in the past to a super-giant city-state with the spread of Sunshine Corp's Neon Shine. In the following main stage, performances by global popular artists and a special medley by O'Hara, the protagonist of the 'Buff Girl' series that is exploding in popularity among citizens recently, are prepared to add to the festival's heat.\n
Peak of the Finale, Artificial Star Blooming in the Night Sky\n
The finale, scheduled for 10 PM, is the highlight of this event and will grandly conclude the Chromatic Zenith. Tens of thousands of hologram particles scattered in the sky above the city will condense into a single point above the central Sunshine Tower, shaping a white star more dazzling than the sun that citizens have forgotten for centuries.
51022_NEWS_SUBJECT: HAPPY POLARNIGHT!\nEnjoy Chroma City's Brightest Night!
51022_NEWS_CONTENT:
Finally, Chroma City's biggest festival, 'Polar Night Day', has dawned! Today, December 21st, is the last polar night of the year and the day to illuminate that darkness with the most beautiful light.

Citizens who may have felt uneasy due to recent unexpected disturbances in various parts of the city, please rest assured now. Thanks to the prompt action of Sunshine Corp and the Independent Government, the city has regained perfect stability. Today, leaving all antagonism and conflict behind, is the time to fully enjoy the glory achieved by our Chroma City.

Today, the output of Neon Shine streetlights and beacons across the city will operate at 150% compared to normal times. Along with the optimal serotonin levels provided by the Nano Catalysts in your bloodstream, you will experience a warmer and more vibrant sense of happiness than ever before. The shadows of depression and anxiety will lift, and only the heat of the festival will fill the city center.

Citizens, the endless night of Chroma City today is never a cold darkness. It is a warm solidarity of light that we create together. We hope you spend the most perfect holiday with your family, friends, and neighbors.


HAPPY POLARNIGHT!

The future of shining Chroma City lies right in your smiles today.
